examples: She gripped on to the railing with both hands.
He walked out on to the balcony where he rested his arms on the railing.
The buses crashed through a metal railing and hung precariously over Interstate 5 for several hours before tow trucks pulled them back on the road.
Here for once he stops railing at imaginary enemies and asks us to re-think foundations.
He acknowledged Syria's economic woes and spared his audience his usual railing against foreign conspiracies.
